question: The average monthly salary of 60 employees of a factory is Rs.29900. If two officers are getting Rs.90,000 each and the average salary of 8 supervisors is Rs.65,000, then what is the average salary (in Rs.) of the remaining employees?

In an examination, the average score of a student was 67.6. If he would have got 27 more marks in Mathematics, 10 more marks in Computer Science, 18 more marks in History and retained the same marks in other subjects, then his average score would have been 72.6. How many papers were there in the examination?

The average weight of students of section A and B having 40 students each is 45.5 kg and 44.2 kg respectively. Two students of section A having average weight 48.75 kg were shifted B and 2 students of section B were shifted to section A, making the average weight of both the sections equal. What is the average weight (in kg) of the students who were shifted from section B to section A?
What is the average of numbers from 1 to 50 which are multiples of 2 or 5? (correct to one decimal place)
What is the ratio of the average of first eight prime numbers to the average of first ten even natural numbers?

The numbers 2, 3, 4 and 5 occur (2+5k), (5k-7), (2k-3) and (k+2) times, respectively. The average of the number is 2.85. Later on, the number 2 was replaced by 6 in all the places. What is the average of the new numbers?

x, y and z are three positive numbers such that y is 4/5 times of x and z is 5/8 times of y. If the average of reciprocals of the numbers x, y and z is , then 17/240 the average of 3 times of x and 5 times of y will be:

The average of the numbers a, b, c and d is 2d-4, Also, the averages of the numbers a and b: b and c: c and d are 8, 5 and 4, respectively. If e = a+d+1, then what is the average of the numbers d and e?
If the average of the 3-digit numbers 335, 2x5, x35, 63x and 406 is 411, then what will be the average of (x-1), (x-3), (x+3) and (x+5) ?

The average weight of a group of 3 people A, B and C is 70 kg. When D joins this group, the average becomes 60 kg. One man E whose weight is 5 kg more than that of D, replaces A and the average weight of B, C, D and E now becomes 59kg A’s weight (in kg ) is:

The average of 35 consecutive natural numbers is N. Dropping the first 10 numbers and including the next 10 numbers, the average is changed to M. If the value of M - N = 600, then the average of 3M and 5N is:

The numbers 24, 45, a, 35, 59, 83, 46, b, 29, 74 are serially numbered as they appear in the sequence. When each number is added to its serial number, then the average of the new numbers formed is 55. The average of the missing numbers (a and b) is:
The average of nine 2 digit numbers is decreased by 6 when the digits of one of the 2 digit numbers is interchanged. Find the difference between the digits of that number.

The average of four consecutive odd natural numbers is eight less than the average of three consecutive even natural numbers. If the sum of these even numbers is equal to the sum of above four odd numbers, then the average of four original odd numbers is:
A batsman in his 11th innings makes a score of 77 runs, thereby increasing his average scores by 3. What is his average score after the 11th innings?
